title: Implement email + password signInWithPassword
description: Wire the /login form to Supabase's signInWithPassword and handle routing on success.
acceptance_criteria: Form submit calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password })
On success: calls handlePostLogin() to route based on profile
On error: displays 'Incorrect email or password.' (not the raw Supabase error)
Submit button shows loading state during the request

steps.details: document.getElementById('login-form').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); setLoading(true); const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password }); setLoading(false); if (error) { showError('Incorrect email or password.'); return; } await handlePostLogin(); });
